title: Cooperative Priority Task Scheduler with Profiling
description: Bare-metal cooperative task scheduler on Arduino Uno managing 4 periodic tasks with per-slot worst-case latency profiling, AVR hardware watchdog, and JSON telemetry over UART. Demonstrates Rate-Monotonic scheduling with measurable deadline compliance.
objective: Schedule 4 tasks at 50/100/200/500 ms; measure max latency per slot; reset on hang via WDT; stream telemetry at 2 Hz.
constraints: Arduino Uno R3; AVR WDT 1 s; 115200 baud UART; tasks must not block more than 40 ms each.
supporting_fact_titles: Cooperative Task Scheduling on Bare-Metal MCU

element_usage_notes.Static Task Table Dispatcher: Core dispatch; period-based cooperative multitasking for all subsystems via scheduler_tick.
element_usage_notes.AVR Hardware Watchdog Supervisor: 1 s WDT; wdt_reset() after each dispatch; logs fault cause to EEPROM on reset.
element_usage_notes.UART JSON Telemetry Sink: Streams per-slot worst-case latency JSON every 500 ms to host.
element_usage_notes.Cycle-Count Latency Profiler: micros() delta per task; rolling max in task entry; reset on telemetry flush.

element_interactions.description: Scheduler measures micros() execution delta per dispatched task.
Worst-case latency included in 500 ms telemetry JSON frame.
Watchdog reset issued after each successful task dispatch.
WDT reset cause read from EEPROM and reported in boot telemetry message.
